title: solidago odora subsp. chapmanii
intro: Solidago odora subsp. chapmanii, also known as Sweet Goldenrod, is a plant species within the Solidago genus that is native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relieving digestive issues and reducing fever, as well as supporting immune function and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Sweet Goldenrod can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
